title: Talamancalia putcalensis
taxonomy: Talamancalia putcalensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Costa Rica. The plant is classified under the order Asterales, which includes other flowering plants such as sunflowers and daisies. Within the family Asteraceae, Talamancalia putcalensis belongs to the tribe Heliantheae. Further classification places it within the subtribe Helianthinae.
